M_5ch_coherence.honest_note: AE round-trip near zero NOT because 5-d carries info, but because z collapsed to constant ~(-1,-1,-1,-1,-1) saturated at tanh; decoder always emits same prefix; round-trip is trivially exact

M_5ch_quality.honest_note: BLEU-1 > 0.20 met, but text diversity comes from Llama sampling temperature (do_sample=True, T=0.8) NOT from z; identical z produces wildly different decoded text per call

M_BOLD_alignment.reason: TRIBE BOLD validation requires full encoder run; out of POC scope (gamma=0)

training_summary.verdict: TRAIN_PASS (loss decreased monotonically, no NaN after fp32 fix)

headline_verdict: MIXED — train converged and surface metrics PASS, but the 5-d bottleneck collapsed to a single saturated point (mode collapse). The architecture as specified is NOT yet a working substrate; CE loss was minimized by the decoder learning to emit a fixed reflective-prefix that the LM then continues regardless of input.
interpretation: Confirms C3a prior: 5-d bottleneck loses prompt-level info under this loss formulation
Decoder + frozen Llama trivially solves CE by collapsing prefix to a single 'safe' starting point
Need: stronger conditioning loss (e.g. contrastive between buckets), z-diversity penalty, or larger latent (32-128d)
Need: per-bucket E_theta evaluation to confirm collapse vs partial preservation
next_steps_v2: Add InfoNCE contrastive loss between buckets (push apart introspective vs math z's)
Increase latent to 32d or use 5 channels each as 8-bit codebook (40 effective bits)
Train E_theta + LoRA on Llama jointly (frozen Llama is too strong a prior)
Per-bucket z visualization (PCA / t-SNE) to confirm separation
